Requirement Statement: Vendors can register and log in to the portal
Defects/Notes: Vendor Login: TC-002 — Account Lockout not triggering

Requirement Statement: Vendors can submit invoices against purchase orders
Defects/Notes: BUG-VIMP-001: No PO expiry validation; BUG-VIMP-002: Rejection email missing reason

Requirement Statement: The AP team can view, approve, or reject invoices
Approved invoices are forwarded for payment processing
Both parties receive email notifications on status changes
The system generates monthly invoice activity reports
Only authorized users may access the system
